steps.title: Calculate the sales tax amount
steps.content: Sales tax equals 8% of the original price. Calculate: $0.08 \times 25 = 2$, so the sales tax is \$2.

steps.title: Add the tax to the original price
steps.content: Total cost equals the original price plus sales tax: $25 + 2 = 27$. The choices are dollar amounts, so the matching total is \$27.00, not just the tax amount or the pre-tax price. The total cost is \$27, so C is correct.
